description: Alex Mercer, a Senior Sales Representative, has resigned. You need to reassign his entire active portfolio to a newly hired representative, Jordan Hayes. Reassign all Accounts and Opportunities currently assigned to 'Alex Mercer' to 'Jordan Hayes'. Ensure that no records assigned to 'Taylor Reed' or any other user are modified. Log in to SuiteCRM using username 'admin' and password 'Admin1234!'.
